---
title: "Disturbing Element, or, Chronicles of the Blue-bell Society, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe” "
---

## Disturbing Element, or, Chronicles of the Blue-bell Society, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe” 

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1878
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book 8vo 240pp

**Publisher:** London: Marcus Ward & Co., 67, 68 Chandos Street and Royal Ulster works, Belfast

### Notes

One of the Blue-Bell series of 14 one-volume novels.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
